anatomy.description: Pill-shaped wrapper that carries the background fill, border, and border-radius. Min-width confirmed at 120px for md.
Optional leading icon slot. 16×16px. Renders before the label.
Required text content. Manrope SemiBold, 14px base size (md). Single line, no wrapping.
Optional trailing icon slot. 16×16px chevron. Signals a dropdown or expandable action.

variants.name: Primary
variants.description: Default action. Main call to action in a view.

variants.name: Accent
variants.description: Highlighted action. Draws attention to a key action.

variants.name: No-fill
variants.description: Ghost action. Low-emphasis or dense layouts.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.description: Bordered ghost. Visible boundary without a fill.

variants.name: Destructive
variants.description: Danger action. Use only for irreversible operations.

states.name: Pressed
states.trigger: Button is actively clicked or tapped.

rightIcon.usage: Dropdown or expandable action indicator only.
